name: cloudflare
description: Cloudflare platform plugin with curated skills for Workers, Wrangler, and Agents SDK plus the official Cloudflare API MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Cloudflare platform guidance with official MCP
interface.longDescription: Bring Cloudflare platform guidance into Codex with curated skills for the broader platform, Wrangler CLI, and the Agents SDK, plus the official Cloudflare API MCP server for authenticated access to live account data and workflows across Workers, Pages, storage, AI, networking, security, and analytics services.
defaultPrompt: Help me choose the right Cloudflare product, configure Wrangler, and use Cloudflare MCP to inspect or deploy this project

connectors.name: Cloudflare API
connectors.description: Official Cloudflare API MCP server. Uses OAuth dynamic client registration and provides token-efficient access to the Cloudflare API via search() and execute().
permissions: Connects to the remote MCP server at https://mcp.cloudflare.com/mcp.
Starts a browser OAuth flow with Cloudflare and asks the user to select granted permissions.
Can read or change Cloudflare account resources depending on the permissions approved by the user and approved tool calls.

credential.label: Cloudflare API MCP
credential.description: Connects Anybox to the official Cloudflare API MCP server using OAuth dynamic client registration.

tools.name: search
tools.title: Search Cloudflare API
tools.description: Search Cloudflare API endpoints and schemas.

tools.name: execute
tools.title: Execute Cloudflare API Request
tools.description: Execute code against the Cloudflare API with the connected OAuth session.

installReview: Uses OAuth dynamic client registration; no static Cloudflare OAuth client ID is required.
Uses the official Cloudflare API MCP server at https://mcp.cloudflare.com/mcp.
Requests are limited by the Cloudflare permissions approved during OAuth connection.
Potentially destructive API calls require approval before execution.
